note: Captured from live DBIE SDMX Data Query (decrypted with adapter AES key). This is the WORKING request chain that returns non-zero rows. The previous probe returned 0 rows because it sent NO FILTER|IN rules, and had advanceOptions=[], unitMultiplier=1, elementLableDetails=[].
dsdExample: LNA_SCB_SR_OCC_BSR1_A_RN (elementId 3046, Stock, Annual - Financial Year, table fact_ebr_lna_scb_sr_occ_bsr1_a_rn)

policy.shape: {body:{policyData:{policyName, username:'test_user', polFreq:'YEARLY', department:'test_dept', rules:[...encryptObjectKeysAndValues], elementDetails:{[tableName]:{Element_Frequency, Element_Code, Element_Flow_Type}}}}}

rules.groupBy: one AGGREGATION/GROUP_BY per dimension column (measure_type_description, occp_gp_item_description, state_code_description, unit_measure_description) with db/table '<ALL_FACT>', elementName=<element label>, dsdList=<dsdCode>
rules.filterIN: one or more FILTER/IN per dimension column, attribute_value = comma-joined quoted MEMBER CODES e.g. measure "'AMT_OUTSD','CRLIM'", unit "'INR'", state "'ALL_INDIA','N_A'" + "'ALLS','UNION_TERT'" + "'CR','ER','NHB','NER','NR','SR','WR'" + (more state rules truncated), occupation "'T'" and "'1'" (UI only selected top level; node should include ALL occupation codes). db/table '<ALL_FACT>', elementName=<label>, dsdList=<dsdCode>
rules.sum: AGGREGATION/SUM on OBS_VALUE, database_name 'EBR_PUBLIC_ELEMENTS', table_name = fact table, elementName 'COMMON', dsdList=<dsdCode>
rules.timeBarring: TIME_BARRING FROM_DATE and TO_DATE on TIME_PERIOD_SK, db/table '<ALL_FACT>', attribute_value quoted 'YYYY-MM-DD' e.g. '2021-04-01' / '2024-03-31', elementName 'COMMON', dsdList 'COMMON'

decryptedDimData.elementLableDetails: [{dsdCode:'LNA_SCB_SR_OCC_BSR1_A_RN', elementName:'Loans and Advances of SCBs State and Occupation wise BSR1 Annual', elementId:'3046', elementType:'Stock', elementFrequency:'Annual - Financial Year'}] (keys+values encrypted)

vsProbeDiff: Probe (0 rows) had: no FILTER rules, advanceOptions=[], unitMultiplier=1, elementLableDetails=[], entitySelection=[], dsdList as array in DDL. Fix all of these.
